author: Red Cogs
install_msg: Thanks for installing ArchiveBox! Set your API key with `[p]set api archivebox api_key,<key>`. Use `[p]slash enablecog archivebox` and `[p]slash sync` to enable slash commands.
name: ArchiveBox
short: Submit URLs to ArchiveBox for archiving
description: Archive web pages using a self-hosted ArchiveBox instance. Supports prefix commands, slash commands, API key authentication, status checks, and configurable server URLs.
end_user_data_statement: This cog submits URLs to an external ArchiveBox instance. API credentials are managed via Red's built-in shared API token system. No Discord message content is retained.
